author: Adnan
caption:
Morning. Early morning run with little to no sleep but still got all the way up the hill to Sacre Coeur. How are there people.here this morning??!?
I guess they stayed up. Mostly. (Notice the beer bottles?)
Anyways, the run was still.fun and it's nice and cool this early but I still had a good sweat going by the end. See my Montmartre video for a quick.selfie at the end.
#aazaadventures

author: Adnan
caption:
Today's adventure is on the Seine river in beautiful Paris! A one hour bateau ride in 2.5 mins. All the sights and a little history along the way. My favorite piece is the lovers bridge which was shut down in 2015 because of the weight of all the locks! 

But lovers will always find a way....

#aazaadventures

author: Amy
caption:
If it’s not the first question, it’s the second, “what are you going to do about school for the year?” We will be world schooling - learning about the world as we travel. There will be some online math, reading (because they love to), and writing (to record our travels and to share stories with our friends). We know that so much learning happens through experiences. We (the parents) will be learning along with the kids too. 

#aazatravels

author: Adnan
caption:
First day of our year long travel adventure!
We begin in Paris, where I grew up. I'll be bringing the kids and @mackling to see the neighborhood I lived in and the school I attended. More importantly the learnings have already started with jetlag, taking care of the body and lessons in communication.
#AAZAadventures #AAZAtravels

author: Amy
caption:
It’s been a long time preparing for today - our anticipated year long journey traveling with the kids. We had to say a lot of (temporary) good byes. We feel sad to be far from family, especially my parents as we’ve lived next door to them for 5 years. We temporarily re-homed Ruby with one of her favorite people, Jeff and his wife, Jessica. We also packed up our home so we could rent out place for a year. Can’t believe it’s finally happening!

#aazatravels
